name: Gemlife Communities Group
analysis: GLF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.6800, stop A$4.3956, target A$5.2000 (1.83:1) — then trail it.
